summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Global Sources feature for Planet GPT. All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend page displays properly with all CRUD operations functional. Fixed a bug where global sources were not being included in GPT chat context.
passed_tests: GET /api/admin/global-sources - admin can view global sources list
GET /api/global-sources - regular users can view global sources (read-only)
GET /api/admin/global-sources/{id}/preview - preview shows extracted text with chunk/word count
Non-admin users get 403 on admin endpoints
Global Sources nav item visible in sidebar for admin
Add URL dialog opens and submits correctly
Upload File button present and functional
Source cards display with correct info (name, type, chunks, date)
Stats cards show source count, total size, and text fragments

bugs_fixed.issue: Global sources not included in GPT chat context
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed projectId filter from single value to include both project_id and GLOBAL_PROJECT_ID
bugs_fixed.details: The get_relevant_chunks function and source names query were filtering by projectId: project_id which excluded global sources (projectId: '__global__'). Fixed to use $in operator to include both.

critical_code_review_comments: GLOBAL_PROJECT_ID constant was defined late in the file (line 2072) but used earlier. Moved to top of file (line 61) for clarity.
seed_data_creation: Test sources created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Global Sources feature fully tested and working. Bug fixed where global sources were not being included in GPT chat context. All admin CRUD operations work. Regular users can view global sources via /api/global-sources endpoint. Frontend page at /admin/global-sources displays correctly with Add URL, Upload File, Preview, and Delete functionality.
